data.title: Gulf Marine Services Sees Increase in Major Holdings by Bank of America
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

The latest announcement is out from Gulf Marine Services ( (GB:GMS) ).

Gulf Marine Services PLC announced a change in major holdings as Bank of America Corporation, through its subsidiary Merrill Lynch International, has increased its voting rights in the company to 7.0028%. This acquisition of voting rights signifies a slight increase from the previous 6.984381%, potentially impacting the company’s governance and strategic decisions. The change reflects a continued interest and investment from major financial institutions, which could influence Gulf Marine Services’ market positioning and stakeholder confidence.

Spark’s Take on GB:GMS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:GMS is a Outperform.

The overall score of 78 reflects Gulf Marine Services’ strong financial performance and technical indicators, bolstered by a favorable valuation. Despite some corporate challenges, such as the Saudi tax appeal setback, the company’s strategic wins and operational strength support its positive outlook.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:GMS stock, click here.

More about Gulf Marine Services

Gulf Marine Services PLC is a UK-based company operating in the marine services industry, providing self-propelled, self-elevating support vessels. The company primarily focuses on serving the offshore oil, gas, and renewable energy sectors.

Average Trading Volume: 2,824,260

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: £237.9M

data.title: Jinhua Capital Faces Delay in Financial Statement Filing
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

The latest announcement is out from Jinhua Capital Corporation ( (TSE:JHC) ).

Jinhua Capital Corporation has announced a delay in filing its 2024 annual financial statements, resulting in a management cease trade order (MCTO) issued by the British Columbia Securities Commission. The MCTO restricts trading by the company’s CEO and CFO until the required documents are filed, though it does not affect shareholder trading. The company is working with auditors to meet the June 30, 2025 deadline and continues to provide bi-weekly updates, ensuring no material changes have occurred since the initial default announcement.

More about Jinhua Capital Corporation

Jinhua Capital Corporation is a mineral exploration company that focuses on exploring gold and critical mineral properties primarily located in Canada. The company occasionally evaluates acquiring other mineral exploration assets and opportunities.

Average Trading Volume: 55,918

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$121.8K

An update from Draganfly ( (TSE:DPRO) ) is now available.

Draganfly Inc. is poised for significant growth following Canada’s announcement of an $80 billion defence modernization package aimed at enhancing national security through technological advancements and domestic manufacturing. The company has successfully integrated a Department of National Defence-specified radio communications system into its drone platforms, aligning with Canada’s strategic priorities and positioning Draganfly for future federal UAS procurements. This development underscores Draganfly’s capability to support military and public safety applications, enhancing its market positioning and potential for securing contracts in the evolving defence landscape.

data.title: Vortex Energy to Conduct Geophysical Survey for Hydrogen Storage Potential
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Vortex Energy Corp. ( (TSE:VRTX) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Vortex Energy Corp. has announced plans to conduct a geophysical survey at its Robinsons River Salt Project in Newfoundland to assess its potential for hydrogen storage. The Ambient Noise Tomography survey, conducted in collaboration with the University of Alberta and partially funded by Mitacs, aims to image the salt dome’s structure, aiding in the development of a hydrogen storage strategy. This initiative marks the first phase of a broader evaluation strategy, with further drilling planned based on the survey results, potentially enhancing Vortex’s position in the hydrogen storage industry.

More about Vortex Energy Corp.

Vortex Energy Corp. is an exploration stage company focused on acquiring, exploring, and developing mineral properties in North America. The company is advancing its Robinson River Salt Project in Newfoundland, which is prospective for salt and hydrogen salt cavern storage, and its Fire Eye Uranium Property in the Athabasca Basin, known for uranium deposits.

Average Trading Volume: 14,141

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$6.03M

data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

An update from Private Equity Holding AG ( (CH:PEHN) ) is now available.

Private Equity Holding AG reported a slight decline in its Net Asset Value per share as of May 31, 2025, with a decrease of 1.1% in EUR and 1.0% in CHF from the previous month. The portfolio’s performance was impacted by negative valuation adjustments and adverse currency developments, despite some positive adjustments in specific portfolio funds. The company remained cash-flow positive, with notable distributions from Eagletree II and Warburg Pincus XII, indicating ongoing strategic transactions and investments.

More about Private Equity Holding AG

Private Equity Holding AG is a listed investment company specializing in private equity investments, providing institutional and private investors with opportunities to engage in a diversified and professionally managed private equity portfolio. The company aims for long-term value growth through investments in selected private equity funds and direct investments, with earnings reinvested and distributed annually to shareholders. The portfolio is managed by Amundi Alpha Associates, based in Zurich.

data.title: Scinai Immunotherapeutics Announces New Funding and CDMO Growth Ahead of BIO 2025
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Scinai Immunotherapeutics ( (SCNI) ) has provided an announcement.

On June 12, 2025, Scinai Immunotherapeutics announced new funding and growth in its CDMO business ahead of the BIO International Convention 2025. The company raised $1.38 million through its Standby Equity Purchase Agreement, enhancing its operational flexibility and financial stability. Scinai’s CDMO business has shown rapid growth, with 2025 revenue expected to reach $2 million, and the company aims to achieve breakeven by the end of 2026. The funding will support the advancement of its nanobody pipeline and expansion of CDMO capacity, positioning Scinai for future collaborations and growth opportunities.

Spark’s Take on SCNI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SCNI is a Neutral.

Scinai Immunotherapeutics is undergoing a financial recovery but faces significant challenges such as negative cash flows and high debt levels. The stock shows neutral technical indicators, suggesting moderate market confidence. Its attractive valuation might appeal to value investors, but the absence of dividends and financial risks may deter more conservative investors.

To see Spark’s full report on SCNI stock, click here.

More about Scinai Immunotherapeutics

Scinai Immunotherapeutics Ltd. is a biopharmaceutical company that focuses on developing inflammation and immunology therapies. It also offers biologics contract development and manufacturing organization (CDMO) services through its Scinai BioServices unit. The company is involved in the development of nanosized VHH antibodies targeting diseases with large unmet medical needs and provides services for early-stage biotech drug development projects.
